zh.Saint Martin,Birmingham,Warwick,England: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比米加姆
zh.Giggleswick, Craven district, North York: 英國英格蘭越可爾吉格萊斯維其可
zh.Birmingham, Metropolitan borough of Birm: 英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比米加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Banks於大約1560年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾吉格萊斯維其可時，她的父親William Banks32歲，母親Alice Robinson42歲。她於1579年1月24日與Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比米加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1660年在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾比米加姆享年101歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Banks于大约1560年出生在英国英格兰越可爾吉格萊斯維其可时，她的父亲William Banks32岁，母亲Alice Robinson42岁。她于1579年1月24日与Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾比米加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1660年在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾比米加姆享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Banks
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Bank 5, with excrescent -s. The final -s may occasionally represent a plural form, but it is most commonly an arbitrary addition made after the main period of surname formation, perhaps under the influence of patronymic forms with a possessive -s.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Bruacháin ‘descendant of Bruachán’, a byname for a large-bellied person. The English form was chosen because of a mistaken association of the Gaelic name with bruach ‘bank’. Compare Bank 6.

variants.name: Bank
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Mort, Ari, Avraham, Galit, Hyman, Isadore, Mirra, Zvia.

German, Dutch, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German or Middle Low German banc, or Yiddish bank ‘bench, table, counter’, in any of various senses, e.g. a metonymic occupational name for anyone whose work required a bench or counter, for example a butcher, baker, court official, or money changer. The surname of German is also found in Poland and in Czechia.
Danish and Swedish: topographic name from bank ‘(sand)bank’ or a habitational name from a farm named with this word.

variants.name: Bangs
meanings: History: Edward Bangs of Chichester, England, came to Plymouth Colony on board the ‘Anne’ in 1623; he is believed to have been born c. 1592.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Banks was born about 1560, in Giggleswick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Banks, was 32 and her mother, Alice Robinson, was 42. She married Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede on 24 January 1579, in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1660, in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Banks est née environ 1560, à Giggleswick, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Banks, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Robinson, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede le 24 janvier 1579, à Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1660, à Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Banks um 1560 in Giggleswick, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Banks 32 und ihre Mutter Alice Robinson 42. Sie hat am 24. Januar 1579 in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1660 im Alter von 101 Jahren in Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Banks è nata il circa 1560 nel Giggleswick, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Banks, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Alice Robinson, aveva 42 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede il 24 gennaio 1579, nel Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1660, nel Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 101 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Banksが約1560年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアギググレスウィックで生まれた時，父William Banksは32歳，母Alice Robinsonは42歳であった。1579年1月24日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバーミンガムでThomas Leatherhead Ledredeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1660年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバーミンガムで101歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Banks(이)가 대략 1560년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 지글레스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Banks(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Robinson(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1579년 1월 24일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 비밍함에서 Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1660년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 비밍함에서 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Banks nasceu aproximadamente 1560, em Giggleswick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Banks, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Alice Robinson, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede em 24 de janeiro de 1579, em Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1660, em Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 101 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Banks родилась около 1560 г. в местности гиглесвикк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Banks было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Robinson, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede 24 января 1579 г. в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1660 г. в местности бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 101 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Banks nació aproximadamente 1560, en Giggleswick, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Banks, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Alice Robinson, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Thomas Leatherhead Ledrede el 24 de enero de 1579, en Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1660, en Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 101 años.
